title: Exchange - External Partner Links
description: quick agent access to Edge ref links for external swaps

actions.value:
If you are having trouble accessing our exchange services from within the app, you can still access these services, particularly for coins that may currently be disabled in-app with these dedicated links:

ChangeHero (support for BSV)


ChangeNow (support for BSV)


Let's Exchange (support for ARRR)

If you are having trouble accessing our exchange services from within the app, you can still access these services, particularly for coins that may currently be disabled in-app with these dedicated links:

ChangeHero (https://changehero.io/?ref=581574809c2448ad832fa2f9d3fe4cb8) *support for BSV

ChangeNow (https://changenow.app.link/referral?link_id=db30644774551b) *support for BSV

Let's Exchange (https://letsexchange.io/?ref_id=TEFfWjFDyDkhnrlR) *support for ARRR
